channel.title: Liqun "Lee" Zhuge on LEE ZHUGE
channel.description: Recent content in Liqun "Lee" Zhuge on LEE ZHUGE

item.description: Working Papers Women’s Property Rights and Marital Welfare: Evidence from a Unique Marriage Payment Tradition Abstract: This paper investigates how enhancing women’s property rights can improve the welfare of both spouses. It examines the effects of a change in marriage law that protects wives’ property rights in the event of a divorce. The study focuses on a unique marriage institution prevalent in China where the bride’s family sets a bride price and provides a dowry to the new couple.

item.title: License
item.description: My blog posts are released under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.
